response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with entrepreneurial experience, but lacks the depth of AI/ML expertise and cloud strategy leadership required for a Principal Engineer role in AI Strategy. Their background is more hands-on and diverse rather than specialized in AI-driven product development or large-scale cloud innovation.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship and tooling (TDD, CI/CD, developer tooling)
concerns: Limited demonstrated expertise in AI/ML or cloud strategy
No advanced degree in an AI-related field
Experience is more hands-on development than strategic leadership at scale
